brief_id='brief_9ec3a7f1ca144914aaeb5a6de822a7a4' run_id='run_c43ec1131e6e45cea82360b4feb97d98' brief_text="# Marriott Bonvoy (Marriott International) — Loyalty Intelligence Brief


**Program Overview.**
- Program Name: marriott bonvoy
- Brand: marriott
- Industry: hotel
- Program Type: points-based
- Geography: global
- Membership Count: 230000000

**Earning.**
- Base Earn Rate: 10 base points for every $1 spent at marriott hotels
- Bonus Categories: ['beverages', 'dining', 'golf rounds', 'other charges made directly through marriott', 'spa services']
- Non Transactional Earn: transferring from select loyalty programs

**Redemption.**
- Redemption Options: ['hotel stays']
- Redemption Thresholds: category 1–4 properties
- Point Value Cpp: 0.8
- Expiry Policy: all free night awards issued will have an expiration of 12 months.

**Tier Structure.**
- Tier Names: ['ambassador elite', 'gold elite', 'platinum elite', 'silver elite', 'titanium elite']
- Tier Benefits: ['gold elite: 25% more points earned on stays', 'gold elite: 2pm late check-out (when available)', 'gold elite: room upgrades (when available)', 'gold elite: welcome gift of 250 or 500 marriott bonvoy points']
- Qualification Period: calendar year

**Partnerships.**
- Partner Names: ['amex membership rewards', 'chase ultimate rewards']
- Partnership Type: co-brand credit card
- Details: ['amex membership rewards transfer to marriott: 1:1', 'chase ultimate rewards transfer to marriott: 1:1']

**Competitive Position.**
- Key Differentiators: ability to transfer points to other members
- Weaknesses: redeeming points for hotel stays has become less predictable with dynamic pricing.
- Closest Competitors: ['hilton honors']" cited_claim_ids=[] word_count=222 entailment_passed=False unsupported_sentences=[]
